case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F., A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION VS. GEORGE FRANK BUSHNEFF et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-27-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-07-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-21-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

AFTER HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212)
